title: premna thwaitesii
intro: Premna thwaitesii, also known as the Ceylonese verbenone or Ceylonese ironwood, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Premna thwaitesii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Premna thwaitesii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine.
